gold.name: Aldercroft Fire
claims: The Aldercroft Fire destroyed most of the town of Aldercroft on 14 April 1907.
The Aldercroft Fire began in a flour mill.
The Aldercroft Fire burned for two days.
The Aldercroft Fire left about 3,000 people homeless.

gold.name: Edith Mavor
claims: Edith Mavor documented the aftermath of the Aldercroft Fire in a series of photographs.
Edith Mavor published the collection Ash and Timber in 1911.

gold.name: Ash and Timber
claims: Ash and Timber was published in 1911.
Ash and Timber collects Edith Mavor's photographs of the Aldercroft Fire aftermath.
Ash and Timber is considered the definitive record of the Aldercroft Fire.
The photographs in Ash and Timber are held by the Provincial Archives.
